ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region (e.g., Africa, Asia, Europe) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Total population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "capital_city" TEXT /* Capital city of the region */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator */,
  "indicator_name" TEXT /* Name of the indicator (e.g., Life Expectancy, Under-Five Mortality Rate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the indicator (e.g., years, rate per 1000 live births) */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the indicator (e.g., Health, Economic, Social) */,
  "sub_category" TEXT /* Sub-category of the indicator (e.g., Mortality, Life Expectancy) */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of data (e.g., numerical, categorical) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the indicator was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source (e.g., World Bank, WHO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates (e.g., annual, quarterly) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last date the data source was updated */,
  "data_quality_score" INTEGER /* Quality score of the data source (1-10) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_values" (
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* ID of the region for which the indicator value is recorded */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator for which the value is recorded */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the indicator value is recorded */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the indicator for the given region and year */,
  "confidence_interval_lower" REAL /* Lower bound of the confidence interval */,
  "confidence_interval_upper" REAL /* Upper bound of the confidence interval */,
  "data_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments about the value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_values_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_value_sources" (
  "indicator_value_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each indicator value source */,
  "indicator_value_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator value for which the source is recorded */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source for the indicator value */,
  "source_reliability" TEXT /* Reliability of the source (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of source (e.g., survey, report, administrative) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_value_source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_value_sources_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_value_sources_indicator_value_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_value_id") REFERENCES indicator_values ("indicator_value_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, researcher) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number for contact */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last date the user logged in */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who accessed the system */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator accessed by the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date and time of access */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator commented on */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who made the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date and time of comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the comment (e.g., open, resolved) */,
  "response" TEXT /* Response to the comment, if any */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_comments_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "indicator_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator for which the version is recorded */,
  "version_date" TEXT /* Date of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in the version */,
  "version_number" INTEGER /* Version number of the indicator */,
  "is_current" INTEGER /* Indicates if this is the current version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_indicator_versions_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "validation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each validation */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the indicator being validated */,
  "validation_date" TEXT /* Date of validation */,
  "validation_result" TEXT /* Result of validation (e.g., valid, invalid, pending) */,
  "validator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the validation */,
  "validation_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the validation process */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("validation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_validator_id FOREIGN KEY ("validator_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
